overview.description: The FT Vest US Equity Deep Buffer ETF - December (DDEC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust index. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. DDEC was launched on Dec 18, 2020 and is issued by First Trust.
